description: Self-contained, portable configuration unit. Defines packages, files, and scripts with cross-platform resolution and dependency management.

children.description: Preferred package managers in order (e.g., [brew, apt, script])
children.name: prefer

children.description: Inline install script or path (used when prefer includes 'script')
children.name: script

children.description: Platform filter: linux, macos, freebsd, ubuntu, arch, x86_64, aarch64
children.name: platforms

children.description: Source path (local relative or git URL with @tag, ?ref=, //subdir)
children.name: source

fields.description: Files to manage (local or git sources)
fields.name: files

fields.description: Environment variables merged with profile env (module wins on conflict by name)
fields.name: env

fields.description: Shell aliases merged with profile aliases (module wins on conflict by name)
fields.name: aliases

children.description: Scripts to run after module is applied
children.name: postApply

name: Module

description: Defines the desired state for a machine: packages, files, system settings, secrets, and scripts. Supports inheritance for layered configuration.

fields.description: Ordered list of parent profiles (later overrides earlier)
fields.name: inherits

fields.description: Modules to include (local names or registry/module references)
fields.name: modules

fields.description: Environment variables (name/value pairs) available in templates and written to ~/.cfgd.env
fields.name: env

fields.description: Shell aliases written to ~/.cfgd.env as `alias name="command"` (fish: `abbr -a name command`)
fields.name: aliases

children.description: Path to Brewfile (relative to config repo root)
children.name: file

children.description: Path to package list file (one per line)
children.name: file

children.description: Path to Cargo.toml to read dependencies from
children.name: file

children.description: Windows Package Manager (winget) packages by ID (Windows only)
children.name: winget

children.description: Shell command to list installed packages (one per line)
children.name: listInstalled

children.description: Shell command template to install ({packages} or {package})
children.name: install

children.description: Shell command to update all packages
children.name: update

children.description: Absolute target path on the machine
children.name: target

children.description: macOS defaults by domain and key
children.name: macosDefaults

children.description: GNOME/GTK desktop settings by schema and key (Linux)
children.name: gsettings

children.description: KDE Plasma settings by file, group, and key (Linux)
children.name: kdeConfig

children.description: XFCE desktop settings by channel and property (Linux)
children.name: xfconf

children.description: Windows registry settings (Windows only). Keys are registry paths, values are name-value maps
children.name: windowsRegistry

children.description: Windows Service management (Windows only). Each entry has name, binaryPath, startType, state
children.name: windowsServices

fields.description: System configurator settings (keys map to registered configurators)
fields.name: system

children.description: Path to SOPS-encrypted file or provider://ref
children.name: source

children.description: Template string to inject secret into
children.name: template

name: Profile

description: Root configuration file for cfgd. Defines the active profile, origin, daemon settings, secrets backend, sources, theme, and module sources.

fields.description: Active profile name for this machine
fields.name: profile

children.description: Auth method for server origins (e.g., device-flow)
children.name: auth

fields.description: Git or server origin(s) for config syncing
fields.name: origin

children.description: Action for new recommended items: Notify | Accept | Reject | Ignore (default: Notify)
children.name: newRecommended

children.description: Action for new optional items (default: ignore)
children.name: newOptional

children.description: Notification method: Desktop | Stdout | Webhook (default: Desktop)
children.name: method

children.description: Mirror daemon log into the Windows Event Log under the 'cfgd' source in addition to the default %LOCALAPPDATA%\cfgd\daemon.log file appender (Windows-only; default: false; reinstall the service after toggling)
children.name: windowsEventLog

children.description: Auth method for server origins (e.g., device-flow)
children.name: auth

children.description: Source origin (same schema as top-level origin)
children.name: origin

children.description: Profile to subscribe to from the source
children.name: profile

children.description: Reject specific items from the source
children.name: reject

children.description: Pin source to a semver range
children.name: pinVersion

children.description: Theme name: default | dracula | solarized-dark | solarized-light | minimal
children.name: name

children.description: Hex color for in-progress / running status lines
children.name: running

children.description: Hex color for diff context lines
children.name: diffContext

children.description: Override individual theme colors and icons
children.name: overrides

fields.description: Theme name (string) or theme config (object with name + overrides)
fields.name: theme

children.description: Git URL of the registry repository
children.name: url

children.description: Module registries — searchable indexes of reusable modules
children.name: registries

children.description: Require GPG/SSH signatures on remote module tags (default: false)
children.name: requireSignatures

name: CfgdConfig

description: Team config source manifest. Published by teams in their config repos to define profiles, modules, and policy tiers available for subscription.

children.description: Profile names available from this source
children.name: profiles

children.description: OS/distro to profile mapping for auto-detection
children.name: platformProfiles

children.description: Module names available from this source
children.name: modules

children.description: Package declarations (same schema as profile packages)
children.name: packages

children.description: Package declarations (same schema as profile packages)
children.name: packages

children.description: Package declarations (same schema as profile packages)
children.name: packages

children.description: Package declarations (same schema as profile packages)
children.name: packages

children.description: Items that cannot be overridden by subscribers
children.name: locked

children.description: Disallow scripts from this source (default: true)
children.name: noScripts

children.description: Restrict file targets to these path prefixes
children.name: allowedTargetPaths

fields.description: Policy tiers controlling how items are applied
fields.name: policy

name: ConfigSource

description: Kubernetes Custom Resource representing a managed machine's desired and observed configuration state.

children.description: Whether the module is required (default: false)
children.name: required

fields.description: Reported installed versions by package name
fields.name: packageVersions

name: MachineConfig

description: Kubernetes Custom Resource defining fleet-wide configuration baselines. Machines are checked for compliance against policies.

fields.description: Required packages (each entry has name and optional version constraint)
fields.name: packages

fields.description: Label selector to match target MachineConfigs
fields.name: targetSelector

name: ConfigPolicy

description: Kubernetes Custom Resource created when a machine drifts from its desired state. Tracks drift details and resolution status.

fields.description: Drift severity: low | medium | high | critical
fields.name: severity

name: DriftAlert

description: Crossplane composite resource for team-level configuration. Fans out to per-user MachineConfig CRDs via composition function.

children.description: Git URL of the team config repo
children.name: url

name: TeamConfig
